'''Jinn Reeso''' was a member of a [[Color/Legends|bluish-gray]]-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Jinn Reeso's species|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who competed as a professional [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], flying a massive black-and-gray [[Jinn Reeso's Podracer|Podracer]]. Before the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Reeso competed in a race that sped through the Tatooine [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], passing through the [[Hutt Flats/Legends|Hutt Flats]].

==Biography==
[[File:NaviorRacing.png|thumb|left|175px|Jinn Reeso (far right) races on Tatooine.]]
The [[Jinn Reeso's species|alien]] Jinn Reeso competed as a professional [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Reeso flew a massive [[Color/Legends|black-and-gray]] [[Jinn Reeso's Podracer|Podracer]] that had average acceleration and an acceptable top speed.<ref name="E1R" />

On the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-[[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]], Reeso became quite skilled at the course known as the [[Spice Mine Run]] and shared the title of track favorite with fellow pilot [[Mars Guo/Legends|Mars Guo]].<ref name="E1R" /> Reeso also once raced on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] sometime before the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], going up against fellow Podracers [[Navior|"Bullseye" Navior]], [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]], [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee]], [[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]], and [[Clegg Holdfast/Legends|Clegg Holdfast]] on a course that sped through the [[Hutt Flats/Legends|Hutt Flats]].<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref><ref name="Prima2">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] includes a picture of Jinn Reeso, [[Navior]], [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]], [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee]], [[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]], and [[Clegg Holdfast/Legends|Clegg Holdfast]] competing in a [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. According to {{DB|character|nevakee|Kee, Neva}}, Kee disappeared during the the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], never to be seen again. No source states that Jinn Reeso or Navior competed in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], so this article assumes that the pictured Tatooine race from the [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Episode I Racer'']] strategy guide must have preceded the Boonta Eve race.</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Jinn Reeso had the reflexes to pilot a Podracer over various kinds of hazardous terrain. A [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], Reeso had bluish-gray-colored skin with some whiter highlights around the cheeks, chin, and [[Limb/Legends|arms]]. Reeso's [[Species/Legends|species]] only had two toes on the end of each leg.<ref name="E1R" />

==Equipment==
Jinn Reeso utilized a massive, dark-colored Podracer. The vehicle had average acceleration and an acceptable top speed. However, Reeso's Podracer had poor handling, and the size of the [[Engine/Legends|engines]] made it difficult to fly straight through narrow gaps or passages. The vehicle could sustain a heavy amount of punishment, being able to take multiple hits from obstacles and other racers before being destroyed. The Podracer was primarily painted black, with gray, wing-shaped logos on the engine and [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]. When racing, Reeso wore a black [[Clothing/Legends|jumpsuit]], a [[Armor/Legends|helmet]], and darkened race [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]] that obscured the upper half of the face.<ref name="E1R" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jinn Reeso is an unlockable playable character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]''. Reeso is not available in normal play but is accessed by using the cheat codes RRJINNRE or RRTANGENTABACUS in the Nintendo 64 version and through a key combination in the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] version of the game.<ref name="GOG">{{WebCite|url=https://www.gog.com/forum/star_wars_episode_i_racer/unlocking_jinn_reeso_and_cy_yunga_on_pc_uncovered_after_almost_20_years|text=https://www.gog.com/forum/star_wars_episode_i_racer/unlocking_jinn_reeso_and_cy_yunga_on_pc_uncovered_after_almost_20_years|archivedate=20180604003326}}</ref> Upon activation, Reeso and his Podracer completely replace all aspects of the character Mars Guo, including the game's record listings and as the track favorite for the game's Spice Mine Run course. Reeso was one of two cheat-code characters in ''Episode I Racer'', the other being [[Cy Yunga]].<ref name="E1R" />

Reeso's voice was provided by [[Bob Bergen]] and [[Jim Ward (voice actor)|Jim Ward]]. Bergen also provided the game's voices for Ody Mandrell, Cy Yunga, and [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]], while Ward provided the voices for [[Fud Sang/Legends|Fud Sang]] and Mars Guo. However, the dual voice acting is due mostly in part to Reeso recycling sound bytes from the other racers. Reeso's voice talent still appears in the game's credits. The model for Reeso's body is a re-textured version of [[Bozzie Baranta]]'s body model.<ref name="E1R" />
